text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, during the middle of summer camp...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Phew... How was that, Trainer?
choice_data_list: That was awesome! Let's do one more lap!
That was awesome! Let's do one more lap!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Okay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek's performance has been on point recently. I'm positive
she'll show great improvement by the end of the summer training
camp.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: ...Oh my, it's already this late. Time flies when you're focusing hard.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe, I'm feeling really good lately. Even though I've already hit
today's targets, I feel like I could keep running. ♪
choice_data_list: But I think it's better to rest now.
But I think it's better to rest now.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Yes, you're right. We've still got plenty of time left at camp.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe, it's nothing. I was just thinking how productive I was today.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I feel like I'm really taking to the plan you created for me.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I shouldn't be surprised. You thought about all my needs when you
made it.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
And that's why I think it's time to give you a reward for all your hard
work! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Yes! ♪ There's a summer festival not far from here. Would you be
interested in going with me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After gladly accepting her invitation, we head off to the festival.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, there are so many kids here. It's so nice to see everyone having
fun!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Well then, shall we take a look at the stalls ourselves? ...But there are
so many—I don't know where to begin.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh, and of course, we should get some food after all that training.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Let's buy something, find a place with a nice view, and dig in. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Super Creek and I mill around, buying an assortment of fun things.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The festival gradually becomes more and more packed as dusk turns
to night.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: There are so many people here now. Let's try not to get separated...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As soon as Creek finishes her sentence, she finds herself getting
swept away in the crowd.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh! Oh my!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Trainer! We should—

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: ...Okay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I grab Super Creek's hand tightly and manage to lead us to an open
area.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I think we'll be fine over here. It was getting really bad back there.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
But I'm glad we were able to hold hands and not lose each other.
Hehe... ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Looking down, I realize that our hands are still together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I quickly let go of her hand.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, there's no need to get all flustered. You were the one who told
me to take your hand.
choice_data_list: Uh, anyway, did you say something earlier?
Uh, anyway, did you say something earlier?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh, did I?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: ...Well, we can talk later. The takoyaki is getting cold.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While eating takoyaki, we gaze at the night ocean illuminated by the
moon and stars.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We sit together quietly, with only the sounds of the waves marking
the passage of time. Finally, Super Creek breaks the silence.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: About that moment earlier...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Yeah... when you asked me to take your hand.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Actually I... was going to say the same thing, but you beat me to it.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: The way you reached out to me... I felt that you were so dependable.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Yes, definitely. You've already grown so much since the day we met.
I'm really proud of you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Creek looks at me gently, a strong motivation swells up inside of
me. The only thing that I want to do is keep working hard for her.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Um... Trainer... hehe.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I know this is a serious moment right now, but you've got takoyaki
sauce on your face.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Embarrassed, I quickly stick my hand in my pocket for my
handkerchief. But before I can pull it out...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Stop! Don't move—just a second.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Super Creek quietly wipes the corners of my mouth.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: ...There we go. All clean now.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, do you remember when you asked me if there was anything I
wanted from you?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I think I know now. Would you like to hear?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
By gaining more and more experience, I know that you'll become an
even greater trainer than you already are.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
But no matter how much you grow... will you still let me take care of
you?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Thank you. It means a lot to me.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: And I hope that we'll continue to spend lots and lots of time together.
